ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "version_control_system" TEXT /* Version control system used (e.g., Git, SVN) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived, on hold) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "spent_budget" REAL /* Amount of budget spent so far */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the build belongs to */,
  "build_version" TEXT /* Version number of the build */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the build was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., succeeded, failed) */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* Type of build (e.g., release, debug) */,
  "build_duration" REAL /* Duration of the build process */,
  "build_log" TEXT /* Log file or summary of the build process */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* User who triggered the build */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the build was performed (e.g., production, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "automatic_builds" (
  "automatic_build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each automatic build configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the automatic build belongs to */,
  "build_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the automatic build (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_build_date" TEXT /* Date of the last automatic build */,
  "build_script" TEXT /* Script or configuration file used for the automatic build */,
  "next_build_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled build */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone for the build schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("automatic_build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_automatic_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification is related to */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the notification is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., build success, build failure, project update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "project_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the project version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the version */,
  "is_beta" INTEGER /* Whether the version is a beta release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_history" (
  "build_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build history entry */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date of the build */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the build */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* Type of build (e.g., release, debug) */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the build was performed (e.g., production, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_history_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_actions" (
  "project_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project action */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_actions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_metrics" (
  "build_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build metric */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., build time, test coverage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* Type of build (e.g., release, debug) */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the build was performed (e.g., production, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_settings" (
  "project_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project setting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., build frequency, test framework) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_date" TEXT /* Date the setting was updated */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the setting value (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_settings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, build submit) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
